method_summary: Agent Laboratory is a framework that uses LLM agents to automate the research process in three stages: literature review, experimentation, and report writing, based on a human-provided research idea.
key_innovation: The use of multiple LLM agents to autonomously execute the entire research pipeline from idea to final report, including code generation and performance evaluation.

key_results.research_expense_reduction: 84% decrease compared to previous autonomous research methods

best_result: Agent Laboratory driven by o1-preview generates the best research outcomes and achieves state-of-the-art performance in machine learning code.
limitations_stated: Human involvement, providing feedback at each stage, significantly improves the overall quality of research.
title: Agent Laboratory: Using LLM Agents as Research Assistants
